shots.title: Embedding schema, client, and store implementation

hazards.description: [architect review] Hardcoded 768-dim in migration creates silent dimension mismatch for non-768 models
[code review] PG store implements EmbeddingStore but all methods throw — hasEmbeddingSupport() gives false positive
[code review] Shell injection via unsanitized git SHA interpolated into exec() command string
[code review] No score threshold filtering — low-quality results returned to agents
[code review] process.exit(1) inside try block skips store.close() in finally
[code review] --format=full --top=8 could inject thousands of lines into Aider context window

bunker_locations: sqlite-vec requires BigInt rowids — better-sqlite3 sends Number as SQLite double which vec0 rejects
sqlite-vec KNN queries require `k = ?` constraint, not `LIMIT ?`
ESM modules cannot use require() — need createRequire(import.meta.url) for native addons like sqlite-vec
Hardcoding dimensions in schema migrations creates silent mismatch when user changes embedding model
yardage_book_updates: src/core/embedding.ts: pure types + chunking (declaration-based for TS/JS, line-based for others)
src/core/embedding-client.ts: OpenAI-compatible HTTP client with env:VAR_NAME apiKey resolution
src/core/embedding-store.ts: EmbeddingStore interface with hasEmbeddingSupport() type guard
src/store/index.ts: migration v4, lazy sqlite-vec loading via ensureVecLoaded(), vec table created lazily via ensureVecTable()
src/cli/commands/index-cmd.ts: incremental (git diff), full, status, prune subcommands
src/cli/commands/context.ts: semantic search with --ticket, --file, free-text; minScore filtering (default 0.55)
slope-loop/run.sh: pre-sprint index update + per-ticket slope context injection with CODEBASE.md fallback
course_management_notes: All 4 tickets landed without reverts or test failures during implementation
6 hazards found by post-implementation review (code + architect) — consistent with S43-S45 pattern of trailing-indicator reviews
First security hazard (water) since tracking began — shell injection in index-cmd.ts, fixed with execFileSync
First architecture hazard (bunker) — hardcoded dimensions, fixed with lazy vec table creation
sqlite-vec alpha dependency (0.1.7-alpha.2) — track for stable release upgrade
